growth_records.strain: Enrichment from high-rate activated sludge, Eawag WWTP Dubendorf (inoculum); reactor COD:P 200
growth_records.medium: Synthetic wastewater, COD:P 200 gCOD/gP (50% acetate / 50% propionate on COD basis)

up.units: gCOD/L/d removed (>=95% of 8.4 gCOD/L at D=1/d)

growth_records.cite: Brison, Antoine et al. Influent carbon to phosphorus ratio drives the selection of PHA-storing organisms in a single CSTR. Water Research X (2022). DOI:10.1016/j.wroa.2022.100150. [PMC9364015]
growth_records.snippet: COD:P 200 ... active biomass yields ... 0.36 +/- 0.07 gpCOD PHA-free gCOD removed-1 ... PHA yield ... 0.02 +/- 0.01 ... PHA content ... 0.06 +/- 0.01 ... biomass iP 13.8 +/- 1.1 mgP gpCOD-1 ... Full and stable COD-removal (>=95%)
growth_records.notes: MIXED microbial culture (not a single prokaryote) - flagged. Steady-state chemostat, SRT=HRT=1 d => D=1/24 h=0.0417/h; at steady state mu=D=0.0417/h, doubling time=ln2/0.0417=16.6 h. Xanthobacter sp. most abundant PHA-storer (44%+/-34%) at this COD:P; 54% total PHA-storers. Yields community-level per gCOD removed. Volumetric COD uptake = D*ΔCOD ~ (1/d)*(0.95*8.4) ~= 8 gCOD/L/d (not biomass-specific; biomass conc not reported as gCOD/L in text). No secreted products (PHA is intracellular storage).

growth_records.medium: Synthetic wastewater, COD:P 400 gCOD/gP (50% acetate / 50% propionate)

up.units: gCOD/L/d removed (>=95% of 8.1 gCOD/L at D=1/d)

growth_records.cite: Brison, Antoine et al. Influent carbon to phosphorus ratio drives the selection of PHA-storing organisms in a single CSTR. Water Research X (2022). DOI:10.1016/j.wroa.2022.100150. [PMC9364015]
growth_records.snippet: COD:P 400 ... active biomass yield 0.35 +/- 0.04 ... PHA yield 0.07 +/- 0.04 ... PHA content 0.16 +/- 0.09 ... biomass iP 7.9 +/- 1.6
growth_records.notes: MIXED microbial culture - flagged. D=1/24 h=0.0417/h; mu=D; doubling 16.6 h. 62% PHA-storers (17% putative). COD removal >=95%. Yields community-level per gCOD removed.

growth_records.medium: Synthetic wastewater, COD:P 600 gCOD/gP (50% acetate / 50% propionate)

up.units: gCOD/L/d removed (>=95% of 8.5 gCOD/L at D=1/d)

growth_records.cite: Brison, Antoine et al. Influent carbon to phosphorus ratio drives the selection of PHA-storing organisms in a single CSTR. Water Research X (2022). DOI:10.1016/j.wroa.2022.100150. [PMC9364015]
growth_records.snippet: COD:P 600 ... active biomass yield 0.31 +/- 0.04 ... PHA yield 0.07 +/- 0.01 ... PHA content 0.18 +/- 0.04 ... biomass iP 5.4 +/- 0.5 ... 81% PHA-storers
growth_records.notes: MIXED microbial culture - flagged. D=mu=0.0417/h; doubling 16.6 h. 81% PHA-storers, stable (CV 4%). COD removal >=95%. Yields community-level.

growth_records.medium: Synthetic wastewater, COD:P 800 gCOD/gP (50% acetate / 50% propionate)

up.units: gCOD/L/d removed (>=95% of 8.0 gCOD/L at D=1/d)

growth_records.cite: Brison, Antoine et al. Influent carbon to phosphorus ratio drives the selection of PHA-storing organisms in a single CSTR. Water Research X (2022). DOI:10.1016/j.wroa.2022.100150. [PMC9364015]
growth_records.snippet: stable microbial community consisting of >90% PHA-storers dominated by Pannonibacter sp. ... active biomass yields lowest ... 0.30 +/- 0.03 ... PHA yield highest 0.18 +/- 0.03 ... PHA content 0.36 +/- 0.05 ... biomass iP 4.0 +/- 0.3
growth_records.notes: MIXED microbial culture (>90% PHA-storers, Pannonibacter phragmitetus dominant 78%) - flagged. Reported SRT=HRT ~1.1 d; using nominal 1 d, D=mu=0.0417/h, doubling 16.6 h. Optimal selection condition. Lowest active-biomass yield (P-limited growth) with highest PHA storage. Yields community-level per gCOD removed. COD removal >=95%.

growth_records.medium: Synthetic wastewater, COD:P 1000 gCOD/gP (50% acetate / 50% propionate)

up.units: gCOD/L/d removed (60-90% of 8.0 gCOD/L at D=1/d; unstable)

growth_records.cite: Brison, Antoine et al. Influent carbon to phosphorus ratio drives the selection of PHA-storing organisms in a single CSTR. Water Research X (2022). DOI:10.1016/j.wroa.2022.100150. [PMC9364015]
growth_records.snippet: COD:P 1000 ... COD-removal ... unstable ... fluctuated between 60 and 90% ... active biomass yield 0.34 +/- 0.07 ... PHA yield 0.13 +/- 0.03 ... PHA content 0.27 +/- 0.09 ... biomass iP 3.9 +/- 0.9
growth_records.notes: MIXED microbial culture - flagged. D=mu=0.0417/h; doubling 16.6 h. P-only-limited: selection deteriorated, 57% PHA-storers, Achromobacter 18%. COD removal unstable 60-90% (uptake rate ~0.75*8=6 gCOD/L/d approximate). Yields community-level.
